title: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley Technical Reports - Robert Pilawa-Podgurski A Method for Optimal Passive Component Sizing in Phase-Shifted Pulse Width Modulated Flying Capacitor Multilevel Converters Applied to Space Robotics (EECS-2025-226) Elisa Krause Dynamical Modeling and Control of the Flying Capacitor Multilevel Converter (EECS-2025-105) Rahul Iyer, Robert Pilawa-Podgurski, Claire Tomlin, Seth R.
